title: Senior Ubuntu Embedded IoT System Engineer
score_reasoning: While the EMEA-remote setup and seniority level align well with your profile, this role has a fundamental domain mismatch with your core strength and stated career direction. The position emphasizes Linux kernel, bootloader development (u-boot), system firmware, ARM/non-x86 platform engineering, and low-level debugging—specialized embedded systems work. Your 7 years of experience is in application-level backend services, distributed microservices architecture, and Python/Go platform engineering. Though you have Python and Linux familiarity, your expertise is not in kernel-level, bootloader, or hardware bring-up domains. This would require a substantial pivot away from your stated goal of deepening technical leadership in high-scale distributed systems at the application layer. The role sits awkwardly between viable location/seniority and a significant skills/career direction gap, placing it in the 'low fit' category rather than outright skip.

red_flags: Embedded systems/firmware focus—outside backend microservices specialization
Bootloader, kernel, and firmware expertise not demonstrated in CV
Role contradicts stated career direction of high-scale distributed system architecture
ARM/non-x86 platform development experience not evident
